title: Legacy ERP Data Quality
description: Sources 3–6 have 30–40% incomplete records requiring remediation before pipeline build.
mitigation: Data cleansing rules applied upstream; ERP team engaged

title: Single Internal Engineer Dependency
description: Raj Patel is the only internal data engineer. Any absence critically impacts delivery.
mitigation: Cross-training junior analyst; full documentation in Confluence

title: Semantic Model Performance
description: Gold layer query times exceeding 10s on large datasets — Direct Lake mode may need tuning.
